summary: Backend refactoring verification complete. All Shopify sync routes extracted from server.py to shopify_sync_routes.py are working correctly. 23/23 tests passed. All existing routes (cart, loyalty, discount) continue to work.

endpoints_tested: GET /api/admin/sync-status - Returns sync status with total_products, shopify_products, local_products, recent_logs
GET /api/admin/untitled-products - Returns products with missing titles
POST /api/admin/sync-products - Triggers manual Shopify sync (admin auth required)
POST /api/admin/cleanup-mock-products - Removes non-Shopify products (admin auth required)
POST /api/cron/sync-products?secret=midnight-sync-tdb-2025 - Cron endpoint for scheduled sync
GET /api/admin/abandoned-carts - Returns all abandoned carts with stats
GET /api/loyalty/balance?user_id=dipali@clubconcierge.in - Returns loyalty balance with points, tier, multiplier
GET /api/admin/loyalty/stats - Returns program statistics (admin auth required)
GET /api/admin/discount-codes - Returns all discount codes (admin auth required)

features_verified.evidence: All admin endpoints correctly require HTTP Basic Auth with credentials aditya:lola4304. Wrong credentials are rejected with 401.

critical_code_review_comments: All extracted routes properly exclude MongoDB _id from responses using {'_id': 0} projection
Database injection pattern (set_database function) is consistent across all extracted files
Admin authentication is properly implemented using HTTPBasic with secrets.compare_digest
Cron endpoint correctly validates secret before processing
File sizes are reasonable: shopify_sync_routes.py (627 lines), loyalty_routes.py (249 lines), discount_routes.py (204 lines), cart_routes.py (676 lines)
Server.py reduced from 11,569 to 9,829 lines (15% reduction) - good modularization
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend refactoring complete. Shopify sync routes extracted from server.py to shopify_sync_routes.py. All endpoints verified working. Test file created at /app/backend/tests/test_shopify_sync_routes.py for regression testing. Previous extractions (loyalty_routes.py, discount_routes.py, cart_routes.py) also verified working.
